app.title: Arabic Teaching Quality Platform for Non-Native Speakers

home.title: Arabic Quality Platform
home.subtitle: A comprehensive platform that automates the full evaluation cycle — from institution registration to the issuance of an official report, with confidence and transparency.

getStarted.d: Quick guide to using the platform

leaderboard.title: Top 10 institutions
leaderboard.subtitle: A live ranking of the best institutions based on completed evaluation results from your database.
leaderboard.empty: The leaderboard will appear after completed evaluations are available.

register.title: Register a new institution
register.subtitle: Fill in the form — your request will be reviewed by the platform admin
register.error: An error occurred, please try again later

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Overview of your account and activity
dashboard.help_desc: Contact the platform admin or check the documentation for detailed guidance.

admin_home.title: Admin home
admin_home.subtitle: A live command center for registrations, catalog resources, users, and evaluation flow
admin_home.hero: Watch the platform pulse from one place: review institutions, keep the catalog healthy, assign work, and export the reports your project needs.
admin_home.catalog_health_desc: Live categories and question resources extracted from your database.
admin_home.audit_desc: Trace important actions and security-sensitive changes.
admin_home.assign_desc: Send requests to evaluators, admin reviewers, or field reviewers.
admin_home.export_desc: Download live PDF and Excel reports from the reports page.

entity_home.title: Institution home
entity_home.subtitle: Your workspace for preparing, submitting, and tracking evaluation requests
entity_home.hero: Start new evaluations, follow every request stage, and keep your documents ready before the review team needs them.
entity_home.total_desc: All requests created by your institution
entity_home.empty_desc: Create your first evaluation request and the progress board will fill with live data.
entity_home.step_prepare_desc: Collect documents and answer simple category questions.
entity_home.step_submit_desc: Send the completed form to the evaluation team.
entity_home.step_review_desc: Track pending, admin, field, and information-request stages.
entity_home.step_report_desc: When the workflow is complete, download the official report.

reviewer_home.title: Reviewer home
reviewer_home.subtitle: A focused inbox for requests assigned to the evaluation team
reviewer_home.hero: Open assigned requests, check answers and attachments, leave clear notes, and move each request to the next stage.
reviewer_home.focus_consistency_desc: Use the A/B/C/D scale carefully across comparable answers.
reviewer_home.focus_notes_desc: Write short notes that explain the reason behind each decision.
reviewer_home.focus_timing_desc: Approve, reject, or request information so the workflow keeps moving.

profile.title: My profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your personal info and account preferences
profile.identity_desc: Update your name and phone — email is bound to your account
profile.email_locked: Email cannot be modified — it is bound to your Keycloak account
profile.password_desc: Change your password securely via an encrypted email
profile.mfa_desc: Add an extra layer of security with an authenticator app
profile.signout_all_desc: End the current session on all devices
profile.privacy_desc: Your data is encrypted and stored securely
profile.privacy_note: Passwords and sessions are fully managed by Keycloak. Our platform never stores raw passwords.
profile.personal_identity_desc: Shape how your account appears across the platform.
profile.bio_placeholder: Add a short note about your role, institution, or evaluation responsibilities.
profile.personalization_desc: Tune the workspace to match how you prefer to work.
profile.email_notifications_desc: Receive account and workflow updates by email.
profile.bio_empty: Add a short bio to make your profile easier to recognize.
profile.avatar_size_error: Profile picture must be smaller than 2 MB.

requests.title: My requests
requests.subtitle: Track all evaluation requests you submitted

new_request.title: New evaluation request
new_request.subtitle: Pick categories and answer questions
new_request.desc: Dynamic form to submit a new evaluation request. Select categories, answer questions, and attach required documents.
new_request.empty_catalog_admin: No active catalog categories are available yet. Ask the platform admin to add categories/questions, or restart the backend so the starter catalog migration can run.
new_request.select_category: Select at least one category to build the evaluation form.
new_request.empty_catalog: The request form needs active catalog resources before it can be used.
new_request.validation_missing: Answer all questions and attach mandatory documents first.

request_detail.title: Request details
request_detail.subtitle: Summary, status and final result
request_detail.desc: View all request details: answers, attachments, evaluator notes, status, and final result.
request_detail.it1: View answers and attachments per category
request_detail.final_result_desc: The evaluation is complete and the official report is ready to download.

inbox.title: Submitted requests
inbox.subtitle: Requests assigned to you for review
inbox.desc: Inbox for evaluation team with assigned requests and filters.

review.title: Review request
review.subtitle: Answers, attachments and decision
review.desc: Browse answers, adjust final ratings, add notes, and issue workflow decisions.

dashboard.title: Admin dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Live overview of registration requests and platform actions
dashboard.pending_subtitle: Newest institutions waiting for your review

required_docs.title: Required documents
required_docs.empty: No required documents configured for this category yet.

shell.title: Admin Panel
shell.subtitle: Full platform administration — users, categories, questions, reports

users.title: User management
users.subtitle: Add, edit, deactivate accounts
users.create_hint: An email will be sent automatically to set up the password.

questions.title: Questions
questions.subtitle: Bind questions to categories and manage them
questions.question: Question
questions.it1: Create new questions and link to categories
questions.it2: Toggle if answer requires an attachment

values.title: Values & scores
values.subtitle: A/B/C/D values and numeric scores
values.it1: Edit value labels (Fully compliant, Largely compliant, …)
values.it2: Tune numeric score for each value
values.it4: Activate / deactivate value without losing history

audit.title: Audit log
audit.subtitle: Trace sensitive operations across the platform
audit.aop_note: AOP audit logging is active for sensitive operations.

reports.title: Advanced reports
reports.subtitle: Live platform analytics extracted from registrations, users, catalog resources, and evaluation requests

chat.title: AQL AI Co-Pilot
chat.welcome: Hi, I am your Arabic Quality AI co-pilot. Try: “summarize this request”, “show risks”, “suggest decision note”, or “what should I do next?”
chat.error: I could not reach the AI endpoint. Try again after refreshing or restarting the backend.
chat.public_login: Sign in to unlock personal AI help for requests, reviews, reports, and dashboard insights.
chat.public_register: Use Register to submit your institution details. After approval, you can create evaluation requests and track them.
chat.status_help: Typical flow: Draft, Pending review, Under evaluation, Admin review, Field review, then Completed or Rejected.
chat.feature_help: I can summarize requests, suggest reviewer notes, detect risks, explain dashboard insights, and guide you to the right page.
chat.general_help: Tell me what you are trying to do. I can guide you to profile, requests, evaluations, admin reports, or explain the workflow.
chat.reply_greeting: Hey. I am here with you. Tell me what page you are working on or what you want to finish, and I will guide you step by step.
chat.reply_thanks: Anytime. I can stay with the workflow: requests, reports, review notes, or dashboard risks.
chat.profile_help: You are on the profile page. I can help you understand language, timezone, avatar, account info, and security settings.
chat.dashboard_help: You are on the dashboard. I can explain what the cards mean, where to go next, or what needs attention.
chat.nav_profile_answer: Use Profile to edit your personal information, avatar, language, timezone, and notification preferences.
chat.nav_requests_answer: Use My Requests to create a new evaluation request, track status, and open final reports.
chat.nav_reports_answer: Use Admin Reports to see analytics, exports, and AI dashboard insights. This is available for platform admins.
chat.nav_general_answer: Tell me the destination: profile, requests, evaluation inbox, admin panel, or reports. I will point you to the right place.

home.title: Home page
home.summary: Public entry point with the platform offer, quick access cards, system components, and the Top 10 institutions leaderboard from live evaluation data.
home.actions:
- Start registration
- Open login
- Explore evaluation flow
- Check the leaderboard

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.summary: Personal workspace that changes by role: institution managers see request progress, admins see platform operations, and reviewers see assigned evaluation work.
dashboard.actions:
- Check live updates
- Open quick actions
- Continue pending work
- Review status cards

profile.title: Profile page
profile.summary: Personal account area for identity, avatar, phone, organization, bio, language, timezone, density, notifications, and security information.
profile.actions:
- Update personal identity
- Upload or remove avatar
- Change language and timezone
- Save personalization settings

register.title: Institution registration
register.summary: Public form where a new institution submits manager, location, contact, and description data for admin review.
register.actions:
- Fill institution information
- Submit registration
- Wait for admin approval and email notification

requests.title: My Requests
requests.summary: Institution request list for tracking drafts, submitted evaluations, workflow status, categories, answers, files, and final reports.
requests.actions:
- Create a new request
- Filter by status
- Open request details
- Download final report when completed

new_request.title: New evaluation request
new_request.summary: Dynamic request builder using catalog categories, questions, A/B/C/D answers, notes, and mandatory documents from the database.
new_request.actions:
- Select categories
- Answer all questions
- Attach required documents
- Save draft or submit request

request_detail.title: Request detail
request_detail.summary: Detailed view of one evaluation request with answers, attachments, workflow decisions, final score, AI report generator, and report download.
request_detail.actions:
- Review answers and files
- Read AI summary
- Track decisions
- Download PDF report when ready

evaluation.title: Evaluation inbox
evaluation.summary: Reviewer workspace listing assigned requests with filters, status, institution, answer counts, and direct access to review pages.
evaluation.actions:
- Filter assigned requests
- Open a review
- Check request status
- Continue pending evaluations

review.title: Review request
review.summary: Evaluation page for checking answers and attachments, editing ratings, writing notes, using AI assistance, and submitting workflow decisions.
review.actions:
- Review category answers
- Apply suggested ratings
- Add decision notes
- Approve, reject, or request info

admin_dashboard.title: Admin dashboard
admin_dashboard.summary: Admin overview focused on registration requests and platform action cards, with pending, approved, and rejected registration counts.
admin_dashboard.actions:
- Review pending registrations
- Open all registration requests
- Approve or reject institutions
- Monitor platform queue

registrations.title: Registration requests
registrations.summary: Admin review board for institution registrations with pending, approved, and rejected tabs plus approval and rejection notes.
registrations.actions:
- Inspect submitted institution data
- Approve valid requests
- Reject with a reason
- Track totals by status

users.title: User management
users.summary: Admin page for searching users, filtering by role, creating accounts, and activating or deactivating platform users.
users.actions:
- Search accounts
- Filter by role
- Add users
- Deactivate or reactivate users

categories.title: Evaluation categories
categories.summary: Catalog resource page for managing bilingual evaluation categories, descriptions, order, status, and required documents.
categories.actions:
- Add or edit categories
- Manage required documents
- Reorder categories
- Activate or deactivate resources

questions.title: Questions
questions.summary: Catalog question page for binding bilingual questions to categories, controlling attachment requirements, ordering, and activation.
questions.actions:
- Add questions
- Link questions to categories
- Mark attachment requirements
- Activate or deactivate questions

values.title: Values and scores
values.summary: Admin scoring page for the A/B/C/D evaluation scale, bilingual labels, numeric scores, order, and active status.
values.actions:
- Tune score values
- Edit labels
- Reorder values
- Keep inactive values for history

assignments.title: Request distribution
assignments.summary: Admin assignment page for sending requests to evaluation team members across initial, admin review, and field review stages.
assignments.actions:
- Pick a request
- Select stage
- Choose reviewer
- Assign manually or use workflow mode

audit.title: Audit log
audit.summary: Trace page for sensitive operations, users, entities, results, and AOP audit logging across the platform.
audit.actions:
- Filter audit rows
- Check action results
- Trace who changed what
- Investigate failed operations

reports.title: Advanced reports
reports.summary: Live analytics page built from registrations, users, catalog resources, value scales, evaluation statuses, scores, AI insights, and PDF/Excel exports.
reports.actions:
- Refresh live analytics
- Read AI dashboard insights
- Check catalog coverage
- Export PDF or Excel reports
